focus_points: Verify whether changed tests reflect real behavior/contract change or only pass-the-test repair.
Assess whether assertions are effective and efficient.
State whether the audit sees brittle test-only shortcuts or weak coverage.
For each material finding, add category and formalizable-hint when you can judge them honestly.
goal: Fresh RR-AUTH-04 test-quality audit after debt-elimination reopen. Evaluate fail-first provenance, assertion realism, weak coverage, and CI-evidence sufficiency on the bounded baseline. Findings first. JSON only.
